abstract_zh: 无损模型压缩在缓解比特精确大型语言模型（LLM）服务中的内存与带宽瓶颈方面具有巨大潜力。然而，现有方法往往因与GPU架构存在根本性设计不匹配而导致显著的推理延迟：在内核层面，传统熵编码器生成的变长比特流破坏了SIMT并行性；在系统层面，解耦的流水线导致冗余的内存访问。我们提出了ZipServ，一种为高效LLM推理而协同设计的无损压缩框架。ZipServ引入了面向张量核心的三重位图编码（TCA-TBE），这是一种新型的定长格式，支持常数时间、并行解码；同时，还设计了一种融合解压与GEMM计算的ZipGEMM内核，可直接将压缩权重在运行时解压至张量核心寄存器中。这种“加载压缩数据，计算时解压”的设计消除了中间缓冲区，最大化了计算强度。实验表明，ZipServ可将模型大小减少高达30%，在内核级别相比NVIDIA的cuBLAS实现最高提升2.21倍性能，且相较于vLLM平均加速端到端推理达1.22倍。ZipServ是首个在GPU上同时实现存储节省和显著加速的无损压缩系统，为LLM推理提供了全新的优化路径。

title: PowerDAG: Reliable Agentic AI System for Automating Distribution Grid Analysis
authors: Emmanuel O. Badmus, Amritanshu Pandey
abstract: This paper introduces PowerDAG, an agentic AI system for automating complex distribution-grid analysis. We address the reliability challenges of state-of-the-art agentic systems in automating complex engineering workflows by introducing two innovative active mechanisms: (i) \textbf{adaptive retrieval}, which uses a similarity-decay cutoff algorithm to dynamically select the most relevant annotated exemplars as context, and (ii) \textbf{just-in-time (JIT) supervision}, which actively intercepts and corrects tool-usage violations during execution. On a benchmark of unseen distribution grid analysis queries, PowerDAG achieves a 100\% success rate with GPT-5.2 and 94.4--96.7\% with smaller open-source models, outperforming base ReAct (41--88\%), LangChain (30--90\%), and CrewAI (9--41\%) baselines by margins of 6--50 percentage points.
title_zh: PowerDAG：用于自动化配电网络分析的可靠智能代理系统
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了PowerDAG，这是一个用于自动化复杂配电网分析的智能体AI系统。为解决当前先进智能体系统在自动化复杂工程工作流中面临的可靠性挑战，我们提出了两种创新的主动机制：(i) **自适应检索**，采用相似度衰减截断算法，动态选择最相关的标注范例作为上下文；(ii) **即时（JIT）监督**，在执行过程中主动拦截并纠正工具使用违规行为。在针对未见过的配电网分析查询的基准测试中，PowerDAG在GPT-5.2上实现了100%的成功率，在较小的开源模型上也达到了94.4%至96.7%的表现，显著优于基线方法——ReAct（41%–88%）、LangChain（30%–90%）和CrewAI（9%–41%），提升幅度达6至50个百分点。

title: Omni-I2C: A Holistic Benchmark for High-Fidelity Image-to-Code Generation
authors: Jiawei Zhou, Chi Zhang, Xiang Feng, Qiming Zhang, Haibo Qiu, Lihuo He, Dengpan Ye, Xinbo Gao, Jing Zhang
abstract: We present Omni-I2C, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the capability of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in converting complex, structured digital graphics into executable code. We argue that this task represents a non-trivial challenge for the current generation of LMMs: it demands an unprecedented synergy between high-fidelity visual perception -- to parse intricate spatial hierarchies and symbolic details -- and precise generative expression -- to synthesize syntactically sound and logically consistent code. Unlike traditional descriptive tasks, Omni-I2C requires a holistic understanding where any minor perceptual hallucination or coding error leads to a complete failure in visual reconstruction. Omni-I2C features 1080 meticulously curated samples, defined by its breadth across subjects, image modalities, and programming languages. By incorporating authentic user-sourced cases, the benchmark spans a vast spectrum of digital content -- from scientific visualizations to complex symbolic notations -- each paired with executable reference code. To complement this diversity, our evaluation framework provides necessary depth; by decoupling performance into perceptual fidelity and symbolic precision, it transcends surface-level accuracy to expose the granular structural failures and reasoning bottlenecks of current LMMs. Our evaluation reveals a substantial performance gap among leading LMMs; even state-of-the-art models struggle to preserve structural integrity in complex scenarios, underscoring that multimodal code generation remains a formidable challenge. Data and code are available at https://github.com/MiliLab/Omni-I2C.
title_zh: Omni-I2C：一个全面的高保真图像到代码生成基准
abstract_zh:
我们提出 Omni-I2C，这是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）将复杂、结构化的数字图形转换为可执行代码的能力。我们认为，这一任务对当前一代 LMMs 构成了非平凡的挑战：它要求在高保真视觉感知与精确生成表达之间实现前所未有的协同——前者需解析复杂的空间层次结构和符号细节，后者则需生成语法正确且逻辑一致的代码。与传统的描述性任务不同，Omni-I2C 要求模型具备整体性理解能力，任何微小的感知幻觉或编码错误都会导致视觉重建的彻底失败。

Omni-I2C 包含 1080 个精心筛选的样本，其覆盖范围涵盖多个主题、图像模态和编程语言。通过整合真实用户提供的案例，该基准测试涵盖了广泛的数字内容——从科学可视化到复杂的符号记号系统，每个案例均配有可执行的参考代码。为了增强多样性，我们的评估框架提供了必要的深度：通过将性能解耦为感知保真度与符号精确度两个维度，超越表面准确性，揭示当前 LMMs 在结构层面的细微缺陷及其推理瓶颈。

我们的评估结果揭示了主流 LMMs 之间存在显著的性能差距；即使最先进的模型在复杂场景中也难以维持结构完整性，这凸显出多模态代码生成仍是极具挑战性的课题。数据与代码已公开，获取地址为 https://github.com/MiliLab/Omni-I2C。

title: Understanding Large Language Models in Your Pockets: Performance Study on COTS Mobile Devices
authors: Jie Xiao, Qianyi Huang, Xu Chen, Chen Tian
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) increasingly integrate into every aspect of our work and daily lives, there are growing concerns about user privacy, which push the trend toward local deployment of these models. There are a number of lightweight LLMs (e.g., Gemini Nano, LLAMA2 7B) that can run locally on smartphones, providing users with greater control over their personal data. As a rapidly emerging application, we are concerned about their performance on commercialoff- the-shelf mobile devices. To fully understand the current landscape of LLM deployment on mobile platforms, we conduct a comprehensive measurement study on mobile devices. While user experience is the primary concern for endusers, developers focus more on the underlying implementations. Therefore, we evaluate both user-centric metrics-such as token throughput, latency, and response quality-and developer-critical factors, including resource utilization, OS strategies, battery consumption, and launch time. We also provide comprehensive comparisons across the mobile system-on-chips (SoCs) from major vendors, highlighting their performance differences in handling LLM workloads, which may help developers identify and address bottlenecks for mobile LLM applications. We hope that this study can provide insights for both the development of on-device LLMs and the design for future mobile system architecture.
title_zh: 装在你口袋里的大语言模型：面向商用现成移动设备的性能研究
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地融入我们工作和日常生活的方方面面，用户隐私问题日益引发关注，这推动了将这些模型本地部署的趋势。目前已有多种轻量级LLM（如Gemini Nano、LLAMA2 7B）能够在智能手机上本地运行，使用户能够更好地掌控个人数据。作为一项快速兴起的应用，我们对其在商用现成移动设备上的表现尤为关注。为了全面了解当前LLM在移动平台上的部署现状，我们对移动设备开展了一项综合性的测量研究。尽管用户体验是终端用户最关心的问题，但开发者更关注底层实现细节。因此，我们既评估了以用户为中心的指标——如令牌吞吐量、延迟和响应质量，也考察了对开发者至关重要的因素，包括资源利用率、操作系统策略、电池消耗以及应用启动时间。此外，我们还对主流厂商的移动系统芯片（SoCs）进行了全面比较，揭示了它们在处理LLM负载时的性能差异，有助于开发者识别并解决移动LLM应用中的性能瓶颈。我们希望本研究能为本地化LLM的开发以及未来移动系统架构的设计提供有价值的洞见。

title: AI-Driven Automation of Semiconductor Device Design Integrating Silvaco TCAD
authors: Arijit Mondal, Ankit Biswas, Indranil Maity
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: With continued semiconductor miniaturization, device architectures had become increasingly complex and had relied heavily on Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD), particularly Silvaco TCAD, for design and optimization. However, extensive design space exploration had remained impractical due to high computational cost and frequent simulation non-convergence. An intelligent, device-agnostic AI-agentic framework had therefore been developed to automate TCAD workflows under the paradigm of Agentic Science. The framework had integrated Bayesian Optimization with three core modules: a deep-learning surrogate model for objective approximation, a classification model for infeasible parameter detection, and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation engine for enforcing physics-based constraints. Validation had been demonstrated across three case studies. Power conversion efficiency in a perovskite solar cell had been improved to 17.73%, the <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$I_{\text{ON}} / I_{\text{OFF}}$</tex> ratio in a charge plasma-based junctionless transistor had increased by 47.4%, and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{5. 2 \%}$</tex> improvement had been achieved in a pentacene-based organic thin-film transistor. Autonomous identification and suppression of ambipolar leakage through mobility optimization had further demonstrated expert-level reasoning. Overall computational time had been reduced by up to 96%.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的半导体器件设计自动化：集成Silvaco TCAD
abstract_zh: 随着半导体器件的持续微缩，器件结构变得日益复杂，设计与优化高度依赖于技术计算机辅助设计（TCAD），尤其是Silvaco TCAD工具。然而，由于计算成本高昂以及仿真频繁出现不收敛问题，大规模的设计空间探索始终难以实现。为此，研究人员开发了一种智能、器件无关的AI代理框架，旨在在“代理科学”范式下自动化TCAD工作流程。该框架将贝叶斯优化与三个核心模块相结合：基于深度学习的代理模型用于目标函数近似；分类模型用于识别不可行参数；以及基于检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）的引擎，以确保物理约束的强制执行。通过三个案例研究验证了该方法的有效性：在钙钛矿太阳能电池中，光电转换效率提升至17.73%；在基于电荷等离子体的无结晶体管中，导通/关断电流比（$I_{\text{ON}} / I_{\text{OFF}}$）提高了47.4%；在五苯基有机薄膜晶体管中，性能提升了5.2%。此外，通过迁移率优化实现对双极性漏电的自主识别与抑制，进一步展现了接近专家水平的推理能力。总体计算时间最多减少了96%。

title: Quantum-Ready ALU: Optimized Design Using Reversible Logic with RTL Design and FPGA Implementation
authors: Agnik Maity, Sumedha Pal, Asmita Sarkar, Bhavishek Mishra, Debjit Roy, Mihir Lal Saha
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: Reversible logic provides a foundation for nextgeneration computing systems, particularly in quantum and emerging nanotechnology-based architectures. Unlike conventional logic, reversible gates preserve information and support backward computation, making them crucial for designing quantum circuits. This paper introduces a reversible Arithmetic and Logic Unit (ALU) that performs eight fundamental operations-AND, OR, NOT, XOR, addition, subtraction, increment, and decrement-using Fredkin, Peres, TR, and modified Fredkin gates. A dedicated control unit manages operation selection, ensuring functional flexibility and circuit efficiency. The proposed design achieves significant improvements by minimizing ancilla inputs, quantum cost and garbage outputs, resulting in a total quantum cost of 71 and contains 16 reversible gates and 14 garbage outputs. The architecture was modeled and verified using Xilinx Vivado HLS and ISE 14.7, and implemented on the Nexys A7 (Artix-7) FPGA platform. Comparative analysis demonstrates better efficiency than existing reversible ALU designs, establishing the proposed circuit as a strong candidate for quantum computing and other advanced computing paradigms.
title_zh: 量子就绪算术逻辑单元：基于可逆逻辑的优化设计及RTL设计与FPGA实现
abstract_zh: 可逆逻辑为下一代计算系统奠定了基础，特别是在量子计算和基于新兴纳米技术的架构中。与传统逻辑不同，可逆门能够保留信息并支持反向计算，因此在设计量子电路时至关重要。本文提出了一种可逆算术逻辑单元（ALU），该单元利用Fredkin、Peres、TR及改进型Fredkin门实现八种基本运算——与（AND）、或（OR）、非（NOT）、异或（XOR）、加法、减法、递增和递减。一个专用控制单元负责操作选择，确保了功能灵活性和电路效率。所提出的方案通过最小化辅助输入、量子代价和垃圾输出，取得了显著改进，总量子代价为71，包含16个可逆门和14个垃圾输出。该架构使用Xilinx Vivado HLS和ISE 14.7进行了建模与验证，并在Nexys A7（Artix-7）FPGA平台上实现。对比分析表明，其效率优于现有的可逆ALU设计，证明该电路是量子计算及其他先进计算范式中的有力候选方案。

title: SSRFense: A Multi-Layered SSRF Detection and Defense System for Kubernetes Microservices
authors: Harid Nutkumhang, Woraphol Huansuriya, Jenwit Thitikawin, Krittin Limotai, Somchart Fugkeaw
publish: 2026 18th International Conference on Knowledge and Smart Technology (KST)
abstract: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) remains a major security risk and has been merged into the Broken Access Control category in the OWASP Top 10 (2025). Existing defenses like input validation, URL filtering, and WAFs are easily bypassed via DNS rebinding, redirect chaining, and obfuscation. These weaknesses are intensified in Kubernetes microservices, where dynamic service discovery obscures malicious serverinitiated requests. Current solutions offer only surface-level inspection and lack visibility into intra-cluster behavior and multi-hop attack propagation. This paper presents SSRFense, a multi-layered SSRF detection and defense framework for Kubernetes microservices. It integrates: (i) an unsupervised Autoencoder that models normal inter-service communication to detect anomalous internal requests; (ii) a supervised LSTM-based malicious-domain detector that analyzes outbound DNS patterns; and (iii) a Neo4j graph-based analyzer that reconstructs attack paths, identifies lateral movement, and highlights unauthorized access relationships. SSRFense further includes an automated remediation mechanism that isolates affected services and enforces dynamic Kubernetes policies for rapid containment. Together, these components provide an adaptive, context-aware defense against both internal and external SSRF threats in modern cloudnative environments. Experiments show that SSRFense achieves high anomaly detection scores (PR-AUC and ROC-AUC of 1.0) with minimal false positives, an average end-to-end latency of 3.23 s, while the detection pipeline achieves the highest throughput of 579 events/s. Furthermore, extensive evaluations show that SSRFense effectively detects common SSRF evasion techniques and multi-hop attack chains. These results demonstrate near realtime detection, scalability, and robustness for cloud-native SSRF defense.
title_zh: SSRFense：一种针对Kubernetes微服务的多层SSRF检测与防御系统
abstract_zh: 服务器端请求伪造（SSRF）仍然是一个重大的安全风险，并已在2025年OWASP Top 10中被归入“访问控制失效”类别。现有的防御措施，如输入验证、URL过滤和Web应用防火墙（WAF），容易被DNS重绑定、重定向链以及混淆技术绕过。在Kubernetes微服务环境中，这些弱点进一步加剧——动态服务发现机制使得恶意的服务器发起请求难以被识别。当前解决方案仅提供表层检测，缺乏对集群内部行为及多跳攻击传播路径的可见性。本文提出SSRFense，一种面向Kubernetes微服务的多层次SSRF检测与防御框架。该框架集成了以下三个核心组件：(i) 一种无监督的自编码器模型，用于建模正常的服务间通信，从而检测异常的内部请求；(ii) 一种基于监督学习的LSTM恶意域名检测器，用于分析出站DNS模式；(iii) 一种基于Neo4j图数据库的分析器，能够重构攻击路径，识别横向移动行为，并揭示未经授权的访问关系。此外，SSRFense还包含一个自动化修复机制，可隔离受影响的服务，并动态实施Kubernetes策略以实现快速遏制。上述组件协同工作，为现代云原生环境中的内外部SSRF威胁提供了自适应、上下文感知的综合防护。实验结果表明，SSRFense在异常检测方面表现优异（PR-AUC和ROC-AUC均为1.0），误报率极低，平均端到端延迟仅为3.23秒，检测流水线最高吞吐量达到每秒579个事件。此外，大量评估显示，SSRFense能有效识别常见的SSRF逃避技术及多跳攻击链。这些成果充分证明了其具备近实时检测能力、良好的可扩展性与鲁棒性，是云原生环境下SSRF防御的理想方案。

title: Power - Aware VLSI Synthesis Using Static and Dynamic Clock Gating Techniques
authors: Aruna M, Archana Nair, Vaishnavi B U, Shilpa Suresh Jagadal, Yashaswini Yadav B S
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: Ongoing progress, in semiconductor manufacturing techniques has allowed contemporary VLSI systems to incorporate intricate digital functions into small silicon areas. Yet this swift expansion has heightened issues related to power consumption in synchronous architectures where the global clock distribution network accounts for a large portion of total dynamic power use. The clock tree frequently toggles each cycle even if submodules are not operational causing switching and significant energy loss. This study offers an analysis of power minimization by employing static and dynamic clock gating methods throughout RTL synthesis. Initially a baseline digital design without gating is created to measure the switching activity and power costs associated with ungated clock distribution. Subsequently static clock gating is applied using predefined signals extracted from finite-state machines, counters and control circuits enabling targeted inhibition of clock pulses, during predictable idle intervals. Dynamic clock gating is implemented with XOR-based activity detection and inactivity counters, allowing the clock to be turned off instantaneously when input or register changes stop, to overcome the drawbacks of static gating. This dynamic technique identifies data idle periods that static approaches cannot utilize. Experimental findings show power reductions with static gating delivering approximately a 29% enhancement and dynamic gating achieving more than a 43% decrease, in dynamic power compared to the baseline.
title_zh: 基于静态和动态时钟门控技术的低功耗VLSI综合
abstract_zh: 在半导体制造技术持续进步的推动下，现代VLSI系统已能在极小的硅面积上集成复杂的数字功能。然而，这种快速发展的趋势也加剧了同步架构中的功耗问题，其中全局时钟分配网络占据了总动态功耗的很大一部分。时钟树在每个周期内频繁翻转，即使子模块处于空闲状态，也会导致开关活动和显著的能量损耗。本研究通过在RTL综合过程中采用静态与动态时钟门控方法，对降低功耗进行了分析。首先构建一个未使用时钟门控的基准数字设计，以测量无门控时钟分配带来的开关活动及功耗成本。随后，利用从有限状态机、计数器和控制电路中提取的预定义信号实施静态时钟门控，在可预测的空闲时间段内有针对性地抑制时钟脉冲。动态时钟门控则通过基于XOR的活动检测与空闲计数机制实现，当输入或寄存器的变化停止时，能够立即关闭时钟，从而克服静态门控的局限性。该动态方法能够识别出静态方法无法利用的数据空闲期。实验结果表明，相较于基准设计，静态门控可实现约29%的功耗降低，而动态门控则实现了超过43%的动态功耗减少。

title: HDL Design and Performance Analysis of Polymorphic Advanced Encryption Standard for high-speed encryption
authors: Nikita Kumari, Balwinder Singh
publish: 2026 IEEE International Students' Conference on Electrical, Electronics and Computer Science (SCEECS)
abstract: To achieve strong data protection across diverse applications, a polymorphic version of the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES), named P-AES, has been introduced and executed. In P-AES, the main operational parameters are altered dynamically with each new encryption key, and these values are accessible only to authorized users during execution. To facilitate this polymorphic feature, the standard AES processes— Substitute bytes, Shift rows and Mix Columns—have been adjusted to depend on the key. Consequently, the internal operations are uniquely tailored for each encryption key, while the recipient can extract the transformation logic directly from the key, ensuring secure compatibility. The entire P-AES design has been articulated using Verilog HDL and implemented on an Artix-7 FPGA with Xilinx Vivado 24.1 for synthesis and simulation. In line with Kerckhoffs’s principle, P-AES depends solely on the confidentiality of the encryption key, not the algorithm itself. The design accommodates 128 distinct operational modes, complicating potential attacks. Key and plaintext avalanche scores were 0.521 and 0.504, respectively. These enhancements, validated through avalanche testing and HDL implementation, indicate that P-AES is a promising solution for high-speed and secure data encryption in contemporary systems.
title_zh: 面向高速加密的多态高级加密标准HDL设计与性能分析
abstract_zh: 为在多种应用中实现强大的数据保护，一种名为P-AES的高级加密标准（AES）多态版本被提出并付诸实施。在P-AES中，主要操作参数会随着每个新密钥动态变化，且这些参数仅在执行过程中对授权用户可见。为了实现这一多态特性，标准AES的三个核心处理步骤——字节替换、行移位和列混合——均被调整为依赖于密钥。因此，每次加密所使用的内部操作都针对特定密钥进行唯一定制，而接收方则可直接从密钥中提取相应的变换逻辑，从而确保安全兼容性。整个P-AES设计采用Verilog HDL语言描述，并在Xilinx Vivado 24.1环境下，基于Artix-7 FPGA完成综合与仿真。遵循克尔克霍夫原则，P-AES的安全性仅依赖于加密密钥的保密性，而非算法本身。该设计支持128种不同的运行模式，显著增加了攻击者破解的难度。经测试，密钥和明文的雪崩效应得分分别为0.521和0.504。通过雪崩测试与HDL实现验证，这些改进表明P-AES是现代系统中高速、高安全性数据加密的一种极具前景的解决方案。

title: Automated and Optimized Design-for-Testability Implementation and Pattern Validation on Benchmark Circuits S38417 and RISC-V PicoRV32
authors: Nirbhay Bisoriya, Akkala Subba Rao
publish: 2026 IEEE International Students' Conference on Electrical, Electronics and Computer Science (SCEECS)
abstract: This work shows an efficient Design-for-Testability (DFT) implementation and validation on benchmark circuits S38417 and RISC-V PicoRV32 using Synopsys tools, including Design Compiler, DFT Compiler, and TetraMAX II. In order to achieve high fault coverage with shorter test times, the methodology focuses on scan chain insertion, test compression, and Automatic Test Pattern Generation (ATPG). Functional correctness is guaranteed during scan shift, capture, and unload operations thanks to simulation-based pattern validation. The effectiveness of the suggested DFT flow is confirmed by the results, which demonstrate fault coverage above 96.9
title_zh: 基准电路S38417和RISC-V PicoRV32上的自动化与优化可测性设计实现及模式验证
abstract_zh: 本研究展示了在基准电路S38417和RISC-V PicoRV32上，使用Synopsys工具（包括Design Compiler、DFT Compiler和TetraMAX II）实现并验证的高效可测性设计（DFT）流程。为在缩短测试时间的同时实现高故障覆盖率，该方法重点聚焦于扫描链插入、测试压缩以及自动测试矢量生成（ATPG）。通过基于仿真的测试矢量验证，确保了在扫描移位、捕获和卸载操作期间的功能正确性。实验结果证实了所提出DFT流程的有效性，故障覆盖率超过96.9%。

title: Breaking the Observability Tax: Dynamic Resolution Anomaly Detection via Topology-Aware Active LLM Agents
authors: Rahul Kapoor, Miray Kas
abstract: The ‘‘observability tax’’—the escalating cost of telemetry in hyperscale data centers—forces a trade-off between expensive full-fidelity monitoring and low-cost sampling that misses critical ‘‘gray failures.’’ While traditional AIOps models act as passive post-hoc analyzers, the novelty of this work lies in reformulating observability as an active, hypothesis-driven process. To achieve this, we propose a Dynamic Resolution Architecture where a Topology-Aware LLM Agent dynamically controls the telemetry resolution of the underlying infrastructure. Our Topology-Aware Active LLM Agent employs ‘‘Sentinel Sampling,’’ monitoring 100% of nodes with low-cost essential metrics and only upgrading to high-resolution extended telemetry when semantically justified. Unlike rigid heuristics, the agent uses semantic reasoning to distinguish legitimate heavy workloads from pathological failures, even when root causes are hidden by layers of indirection in our physics-based simulation. Experimental results showthe Active Agent achieves an F1 score of 0.95, significantly outperforming a cost-matched heuristic baseline (F1 0.65). Using a ‘‘Skeptical Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)’’ protocol, the agent achieves 0.99 precision in distinguishing genuine failures from high-load noise. Our ‘‘Wake-on-Anomaly’’ cost model shows an 84% reduction in telemetry bandwidth and a 12.5% reduction in Total Cost of Ownership compared to standard ingestion. This work demonstrates that observability is primarily a data selection, not data volume, problem, solvable via semantic active reasoning.
title_zh: 打破可观测性税：通过拓扑感知的主动大语言模型代理实现动态解析异常检测
abstract_zh: “可观测性税”——超大规模数据中心中遥测成本的持续上升——迫使我们在昂贵的全精度监控与低成本采样之间做出权衡，而后者往往遗漏关键的“灰色故障”。传统AIOps模型仅作为被动的事后分析工具，而本工作的创新之处在于将可观测性重新定义为一种主动的、基于假设驱动的过程。为此，我们提出了一种动态分辨率架构，其中具备拓扑感知能力的大型语言模型（LLM）代理能够动态调控底层基础设施的遥测分辨率。我们的拓扑感知主动LLM代理采用“哨兵采样”策略：对所有节点进行100%的低开销基础指标监控，仅在语义上合理时才升级至高分辨率扩展遥测。与僵化的启发式规则不同，该代理利用语义推理能力，能够在物理仿真中根因被多层间接机制掩盖的情况下，准确区分真实的重负载与病态故障。实验结果表明，该主动代理的F1得分为0.95，显著优于成本相当的启发式基线（F1为0.65）。通过采用“怀疑主义站点可靠性工程师（SRE）”协议，该代理在区分真实故障与高负载噪声方面实现了0.99的精确率。我们的“异常唤醒”成本模型显示，相比标准数据摄入方式，遥测带宽降低了84%，总体拥有成本（TCO）减少了12.5%。本研究证明，可观测性的核心问题并非数据量，而是数据选择，可通过语义驱动的主动推理得以解决。

title: LLM-powered Intent-driven Configuration Generation for Multi-vendor Networks
authors: Jingyu Wang, Bo He, Jinyu Zhao, Yixin Xuan, Haifeng Sun, Qi Qi, Junzhe Liang, Zirui Zhuang, Jianxin Liao
publish: IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management
abstract: Network configuration management has become increasingly complex, inefficient, and prone to errors due to frequent updates in command structures and the prevalence of multi-vendor network infrastructures. To tackle these challenges, this paper introduces a novel cognitive communication approach, formulating a new task called intent-driven multi-vendor network configuration generation. Within the broader intent-based networking lifecycle, this task specifically targets the realization and command generation stage—translating natural language operational intents into accurate and syntactically valid network commands compatible with multiple vendors, rather than addressing high-level intent interpretation or decomposition. Three primary challenges are addressed: syntactical command validity, vendor-specific syntax diversity, and outdated or inconsistent network knowledge. We propose ConfGen, a cognitive and intent-driven multi-vendor configuration generation framework that consists of two phases: vendor-agnostic syntax retrieval and syntax-constrained command generation. In the first phase, a cognitive retrieval mechanism and reranking strategy identify the most relevant syntax structures based on user intents, while vendor-specific syntax components are effectively generalized. The second phase employs a Large Language Model (LLM) guided by retrieved syntax constraints and user intents to generate precise and valid network commands. To ensure syntactical correctness and vendor compatibility, syntax-constrained decoding strategies are integrated into the LLM generation process. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on a novel dataset containing network commands from Huawei, Cisco, Nokia, and Juniper demonstrate the superiority of ConfGen. Results confirm significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art solutions in generating accurate, multi-vendor-compatible network configurations driven by user intent.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的意图驱动多厂商网络配置生成
abstract_zh: 网络配置管理由于命令结构频繁更新以及多厂商网络基础设施的普遍应用，变得日益复杂、低效且容易出错。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的认知通信方法，定义了一项新任务——面向多厂商的意图驱动网络配置生成。在更广泛的意图驱动网络生命周期中，该任务聚焦于“实现与命令生成”阶段，即把自然语言形式的操作意图转化为准确且语法正确的多厂商兼容网络命令，而非处理高层意图的理解或分解。本文重点解决三大挑战：命令语法的有效性、不同厂商间的语法差异性，以及过时或不一致的网络知识问题。为此，我们提出了ConfGen——一种认知驱动的多厂商配置生成框架，包含两个阶段：无厂商依赖的语法检索和语法约束下的命令生成。第一阶段通过认知检索机制与重排序策略，基于用户意图识别最相关的语法结构，并有效泛化各厂商特有的语法组件；第二阶段则利用大型语言模型（LLM），在检索到的语法约束和用户意图指导下生成精确且合法的网络命令。为确保语法正确性和厂商兼容性，我们在LLM生成过程中引入了语法约束解码策略。在包含华为、思科、诺基亚和瞻博网络命令的新数据集上进行的大量实验评估表明，ConfGen具有显著优势。结果证实，与现有最优方案相比，ConfGen在由用户意图驱动的准确、多厂商兼容网络配置生成方面实现了显著性能提升。

title: Research on a Compliance Evaluation Framework for the Informatization Construction of Group Subsidiaries Based on LLMOps
authors: ZeTao Lu, Fang Huang, Meng Wang, Nan Wu, YueLi Lu
publish: 2025 21st International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Security (CIS)
abstract: The disparity in informatization levels among subsidiaries presents significant challenges for large enterprise groups in evaluating whether subsidiary information systems are compliant. Manual audits are labor-intensive and often fail to deliver timely or reliable insights, thereby weakening overall group governance and increasing systemic risks. To address this issue, this paper proposes a dual-channel compliance evaluation framework based on Large Language Model Operations (LLMOps), integrating knowledge-driven questionnaire generation with locally deployed MCP (Model-Controlled Parsing) services. The system supports both active reporting and passive evidence acquisition, enabling automated and multi-dimensional compliance assessment. Simulation results show that, compared with manual methods, the framework improves efficiency in subsidiary compliance evaluation by <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{5}-\mathbf{8}$</tex> times and enhances accuracy by about 10%. The model demonstrates practical value in intelligent compliance supervision of grassroots units and provides a scalable path toward unified governance.
title_zh: 基于LLMOps的集团子公司信息化建设合规性评估框架研究
abstract_zh: 子公司间信息化水平的差异给大型企业集团评估下属单位信息系统合规性带来了巨大挑战。人工审计工作量大，且往往无法及时、可靠地提供洞察，从而削弱了集团整体治理能力，增加了系统性风险。为应对这一问题，本文提出一种基于大语言模型运维（LLMOps）的双通道合规评估框架，融合基于知识的问卷生成与本地部署的MCP（模型控制解析）服务。该系统支持主动上报与被动证据采集相结合，实现自动化、多维度的合规评估。仿真结果表明，相较于传统人工方法，该框架在子公司合规评估效率上提升了5至8倍，准确率提升约10%。该模型在基层单位智能合规监管中展现出实际应用价值，并为实现统一治理提供了可扩展的路径。

title: Improving AMS Verification Efficiency Through Test-Bench and Environment Optimization
authors: Bikram Biswas, Barjeestahseen Mulla, Shrikant Pattar
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: In present System on Chip design, Analog and mixed signal (AMS) circuits play an important role. Due to the complex behaviour of ICs, there are many challenges in verification of overall system. Simulation time for top level AMS verification is one of the biggest challenges in current time due to complex system. In this paper, some of the verification practices have been discussed to improve the simulation speed. Approximately 5 -time improvement of the speed has been observed during our experiment.
title_zh: 通过测试平台与环境优化提升AMS验证效率
abstract_zh: 在当前的片上系统（System on Chip）设计中，模拟及混合信号（AMS）电路起着至关重要的作用。由于集成电路行为的复杂性，整个系统的验证面临诸多挑战。目前，顶层AMS验证的仿真时间是最大的挑战之一，尤其在系统复杂度较高的情况下。本文讨论了一些验证实践方法，旨在提升仿真速度。实验结果显示，仿真速度大约提升了5倍。

title: DPR-PIM: Diagnosis and Pipelined Repair Architecture for Processing-in-Memory
authors: Yunje Hwang, Younghun Kang, Hayoung Lee
publish: IEEE Transactions on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) Systems
abstract: Digital processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures have garnered significant attention for their ability to overcome the memory bottleneck in artificial intelligence (AI) acceleration. However, unlike conventional logic accelerators, dynamic random access memory (DRAM)-based digital PIMs tightly integrate compute and memory arrays within a single chip. This close coupling makes any logic fault directly affect stored data, leading to more critical system-level failures. Moreover, the coexistence of logic and memory components significantly increases testing complexity and fault localization difficulty. As AI is increasingly adopted in mission-critical domains such as autonomous driving, healthcare, and finance, the tolerance for computational errors continues to decline. In PIM-based AI accelerators, permanent faults originating from manufacturing processes can accumulate and propagate over repeated computations, making reliability and precision critical in safety-sensitive applications. To ensure high reliability, precise and independent fault diagnosis of all arithmetic units (AUs), including multipliers and adders, is essential. The proposed DPR-PIM architecture addresses this critical need by enabling complete per-unit diagnosis and fault localization. The DPR-PIM fully utilizes standard automatic test equipment (ATE) interfaces used in conventional memory testing, making it a practical and production-compatible solution. Moreover, DPR-PIM enables pipelined repair for single faults in adder stages based on accurate diagnosis results and applies fault blocking to prevent error propagation when multiple faults occur within the same adder stage or when faults occur in multipliers. By combining high test coverage, reliable repair mechanisms, and minimal area overhead, DPR-PIM offers a robust and scalable architecture for next-generation digital PIM systems.
title_zh: DPR-PIM：面向存算一体的诊断与流水线修复架构
abstract_zh:
基于DRAM的数字存内计算（PIM）架构因其能够突破人工智能（AI）加速中的内存瓶颈而受到广泛关注。然而，与传统逻辑加速器不同，基于DRAM的数字PIM将计算阵列与存储阵列紧密集成于单一芯片中。这种高度耦合的结构使得任何逻辑故障都会直接影响存储数据，从而引发更为严重的系统级故障。此外，逻辑与存储单元共存显著增加了测试复杂性以及故障定位的难度。随着AI在自动驾驶、医疗健康和金融等关键任务领域日益普及，对计算错误的容忍度持续降低。在PIM-based AI加速器中，制造过程中产生的永久性故障可能在反复计算中累积并传播，因此在安全敏感的应用中，可靠性和精度至关重要。为确保高可靠性，必须对所有算术单元（AUs），包括乘法器和加法器，实现精确且独立的故障诊断。

为此，本文提出的DPR-PIM架构有效解决了这一关键需求，实现了针对每个单元的完整诊断与故障定位。DPR-PIM充分利用了传统内存测试中标准的自动测试设备（ATE）接口，使其成为一种实用且可投入生产的解决方案。此外，DPR-PIM可根据精准的诊断结果，对加法器阶段的单个故障实施流水线式修复，并在多个故障同时出现在同一加法器阶段或乘法器中时，启用故障屏蔽机制以防止错误传播。通过结合高测试覆盖率、可靠的修复机制以及极小的面积开销，DPR-PIM为下一代数字PIM系统提供了一种稳健且可扩展的架构方案。

title: Architectural Assessment of a CIM-OR hard-block for FPGAs
authors: Bharat Singh Choudhary, Arvind Rajawat
publish: 2026 IEEE International Students' Conference on Electrical, Electronics and Computer Science (SCEECS)
abstract: In conventional Field Programable Gate Array (FPGA) fabrics, the separation of processing and memory results in significant performance and area losses for broad, bitparallel workloads. Although architectural exploration is prevalent, but the effectiveness of fine-grained, memory-centric primitives is still not well explored. This study presents a stateful Compute-In-Memory OR (CIM-OR) primitive, incorporated as a hard block within a typical FPGA architecture. We show that this fine-grained specialization leads to big improvements in architecture. Our CIM-enhanced design gets a performance boost of up to $158 \%(2.5 \mathrm{x})$ and a cut in logic area and Configurable Logic Blocks (CLBs) utilization by 70%, and reduced delay up to 61% compared to a normal LUT-based implementation when we do a scalability analysis on an N-bit ALU test. These results confirm that our strategy is a strong way to make FPGAs that are denser and have higher throughput, which is what we need for bitwise processing.
title_zh: FPGA用CIM-OR硬核的架构评估
abstract_zh: 在传统的现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）结构中，处理与存储的分离导致广泛且位并行的工作负载面临显著的性能和面积损失。尽管架构探索已十分普遍，但针对细粒度、以内存为中心的原语的有效性仍尚未得到充分研究。本研究提出了一种具有状态的存内计算或门（CIM-OR）原语，并将其作为硬核模块集成到典型的FPGA架构中。我们证明，这种细粒度的专用化设计带来了显著的架构提升。在对N位算术逻辑单元（ALU）测试进行可扩展性分析时，与传统的基于查找表（LUT）的实现相比，我们的CIM增强型设计实现了高达158%（2.5倍）的性能提升，逻辑面积和可配置逻辑块（CLBs）利用率降低了70%，延迟最高减少61%。这些结果证实，我们的策略是一种强有力的途径，能够实现更密集、更高吞吐量的FPGA，这正是位级处理所迫切需要的。

title: Intelligent Hybrid Feature Optimization and Boosting Ensemble Model for Software Defect Prediction
authors: Umair Mujtaba, Nafeesa Ambreen, Jawad Usman Arshad, Nauman Khan
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Advancements in Computational Sciences (ICACS)
abstract: Software bugs have remained a prominent problem in contemporary software development environments, resulting in financial losses, project delays, and system unreliability. Conventional bug prediction models have proven less effective when dealing with higher-dimensional problem spaces and less relevant attribute information. To counter these effects, this paper proposes a hybrid machine learning model incorporating PCA, Mutual Information, RFE, and an Ensemble Boosting classifier. In this hybrid model, PCA is used to capture the principal directions of variance, which can successfully handle dimensional issues. Mutual Information and RFE are used in combination to discover and select more informative and discriminating features. Ensemble Boosting is used as a classifier to successfully learn non-linear relationships among these informative features. The hybrid model proposed in this paper performed defect accuracy tests on a variety of NASA datasets, with an accuracy of 97.
title_zh: 软件缺陷预测的智能混合特征优化与增强集成模型
abstract_zh: 软件缺陷在当代软件开发环境中始终是一个突出的问题，导致了财务损失、项目延期以及系统不可靠性。传统的缺陷预测模型在处理高维问题空间和不相关属性信息时表现不佳。为应对这些问题，本文提出了一种融合主成分分析（PCA）、互信息（Mutual Information）、递归特征消除（RFE）以及集成提升分类器的混合机器学习模型。在该混合模型中，PCA用于捕捉数据方差的主要方向，有效解决了维度问题；互信息与RFE相结合，用于发现并选择更具信息量和区分度的特征；而集成提升分类器则能够有效学习这些重要特征之间的非线性关系。本文提出的混合模型在多个NASA数据集上进行了缺陷预测准确率测试，准确率达到了97%。

title: Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Planning Frameworks: A Systematic Review (2023-2025)
authors: Ebai Geslen Muwa, Vaneet Kumar, Ruchika Gupta
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: The development of large language models has motivated researchers to combine symbolic planners with LLMs to make them reliable, rational, and reasonably efficient in planning. LLMs can comprehend and produce natural language, yet their poor logical reasoning prevents them from being trusted in independent planning. On the other hand, symbolic planners ensure the logical validity of actions but are not able to read unstructured or ambiguous human specifications. Hybrid neuro-symbolic models like Teriyaki, Formal-LLM and Metagent-P fill these gaps with the language capability of LLMs and logical reasoning of symbolic planners, to generate more predictable and context-specific plans. after a detailed analysis of the studies reviewed, we noticed that standalone LLM planners have higher execution errors with less accuracy compared to symbolic frameworks that are more reliable, precise and safe in all planning activities. Nevertheless, the reviewed evidence also indicates that existing hybrid models have efficiency, scalability and deployment cost challenges, which this review compares with existing frameworks and points out how far hybrid neuro-symbolic planning architectures have gone. It also highlights gaps that future researchers must address in order to develop credible and extendable AI planning systems
title_zh: 混合神经符号规划框架：系统性综述（2023–2025）
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型的发展促使研究人员将符号规划器与大语言模型相结合，以提升其在规划任务中的可靠性、理性以及合理的效率。尽管大语言模型能够理解并生成自然语言，但其薄弱的逻辑推理能力使其难以在独立规划中被充分信任。相反，符号规划器虽能确保动作的逻辑有效性，却无法处理非结构化或模糊的人类指令。像Teriyaki、Formal-LLM和Metagent-P这样的混合神经符号模型，通过融合大语言模型的语言能力与符号规划器的逻辑推理优势，能够生成更具可预测性且更符合上下文的规划方案。通过对所综述研究的深入分析，我们发现，独立使用大语言模型进行规划的系统在执行过程中错误率更高，准确性较低；而符号框架则在所有规划活动中表现出更高的可靠性、精确性和安全性。然而，现有研究证据也表明，当前的混合模型仍面临效率、可扩展性以及部署成本等方面的挑战。本文对这些挑战与现有框架进行了对比分析，指出了当前混合神经符号规划架构所取得的进展，并强调了未来研究者必须解决的关键差距，以推动可信且可扩展的人工智能规划系统的发展。

title: Performance-Aligned LLMs for Generating Fast HPC Code
authors: Daniel Nichols, Pranav Polasam, Harshitha Menon, Aniruddha Marathe, Todd Gamblin, Abhinav Bhatele
publish: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
abstract: Optimizing scientific software is a difficult task because codebases are often large and complex, and performance can depend upon several factors including the algorithm, its implementation, and hardware among others. Causes of poor performance can originate from disparate sources and be difficult to diagnose. Recent years have seen a multitude of work that use large language models (LLMs) to assist in software development tasks. However, these tools are trained to model the distribution of code as text, and are not specifically designed to understand performance aspects of code. In this work, we introduce a reinforcement learning based methodology to align the outputs of code LLMs with performance. This allows us to build upon the current code modeling capabilities of LLMs and extend them to generate better performing code. We demonstrate that our fine tuned model improves the expected speedup of generated code over base models for a set of benchmark tasks from 0.9 to 1.6 for serial code and 1.9 to 4.5 for OpenMP parallel code.
title_zh: 面向高性能计算代码生成的性能对齐大模型
abstract_zh: 优化科学软件是一项艰巨的任务，因为代码库通常规模庞大且结构复杂，性能受多种因素影响，包括算法选择、实现方式以及硬件环境等。性能不佳的原因可能来自各种不同的源头，且难以诊断。近年来，大量研究利用大型语言模型（LLMs）来辅助软件开发任务。然而，这些工具主要针对代码作为文本的分布进行建模，并未专门设计用于理解代码的性能特征。在本研究中，我们提出一种基于强化学习的方法，将代码生成型大模型的输出与实际性能对齐。该方法使我们能够在现有大模型代码建模能力的基础上，进一步扩展其功能，生成性能更优的代码。实验结果表明，经过微调后的模型在一系列基准任务上，相较于基础模型，显著提升了生成代码的预期加速比：串行代码的加速比从0.9提升至1.6，OpenMP并行代码的加速比从1.9提升至4.5。

title: Adaptive Hybrid Agents for CRM: Combining Rule Engines, LLMs, and Feedback Loops for Reliable Automation
authors: Nikita Kothari, Vinay Venkatesh, Varun Joshi, Lav Kumar
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Electronics, Materials Engineering &amp; Nano-Technology (IEMENTech)
abstract: As enterprise systems evolve from deterministic automation toward adaptive agentic intelligence, the challenge of balancing creativity, compliance, and reliability has become central to Customer Relationship Management (CRM) automation. This research presents the Adaptive Hybrid Agent (AHA) — a unified architecture that combines symbolic rule reasoning, large language model (LLM) inference, and continuous feedback-driven adaptation. The AHA architecture features a meta-controller that dynamically orchestrates between symbolic, neural, and hybrid reasoning paths according to context complexity, confidence thresholds, and feedback gradients derived from user interaction and system metrics. By employing multi-modal feedback including rule validation outcomes, engagement signals, and hallucination scores, the framework achieves self-calibrating behavior that improves both accuracy and adaptability under domain drift. Empirical evaluation across CRM workflows such as campaign generation, text-to-SQL analytic reasoning, and policy-aware message composition demonstrates significant improvements in factual grounding (+57%), task success rate (+14%), and engagement uplift (+25%) relative to static or single-modality baselines. These findings suggest that adaptive hybrid architectures enable reliable, auditable, and continually self-improving CRM agents, capable of aligning generative reasoning with enterprise governance.
title_zh: 用于客户关系管理的自适应混合代理：结合规则引擎、大语言模型与反馈回路实现可靠自动化
abstract_zh: 随着企业系统从确定性自动化向自适应智能体（agentic intelligence）演进，如何在创造力、合规性与可靠性之间取得平衡，已成为客户关系管理（CRM）自动化中的核心挑战。本研究提出一种自适应混合智能体（Adaptive Hybrid Agent, AHA）——一种统一架构，融合符号规则推理、大语言模型（LLM）推断以及持续反馈驱动的自适应机制。AHA架构配备一个元控制器（meta-controller），可根据上下文复杂度、置信度阈值以及来自用户交互和系统指标的反馈梯度，动态协调符号推理、神经网络推理与混合推理路径之间的切换。通过引入多模态反馈机制，包括规则验证结果、用户参与信号及幻觉评分，该框架实现了自我校准行为，在面对领域漂移时显著提升了准确性和适应能力。在多个CRM工作流中的实证评估表明，相较于静态或单一模态基线，AHA在任务生成、文本转SQL分析推理以及政策感知消息撰写等场景中，分别实现了事实准确性提升57%、任务成功率提高14%、用户参与度增长25%。研究结果表明，自适应混合架构能够构建出可靠、可审计且持续自我优化的CRM智能体，有效实现生成式推理与企业治理要求的对齐。

title: Towards Intelligent Microfluidics: An LLM-Based Droplets Controlling Framework_supp1-3674635.mp4
authors: Jianguang Zhou
abstract: Digital microfluidics (DMF) is a versatile platform that enables parallel droplet operations and on-site programmable control, where droplet routing is a critical challenge for achieving automation. To enable automatic path generation from source to target electrodes and process-level feedback correction, this study proposes an adaptive intelligent control framework based on large language models (LLMs). The framework integrates language-guided topological map reconstruction, LLM-based path planning, and a dual closed-loop feedback mechanism to achieve high-precision droplet manipulation. To alleviate the spatial hallucination issues of LLMs in spatial reasoning such as discontinuous path planning and out-of-bound errors, a linguistic topological map reconstruction method is designed, improving path generation accuracy by 23.4% in complex obstacle environments compared to conventional spatial representations. In addition, a dual closed-loop feedback strategy is proposed, consisting of model self-correction feedback and camera-based image feedback, which enables real-time correction of routing deviations and enhances operational stability. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 100% task success across various droplet distribution scenarios, significantly advancing the intelligence of microfluidic operations and providing a promising foundation for fully autonomous DMF systems.
title_zh: 面向智能微流控：基于大语言模型的液滴控制框架_supp1-3674635.mp4
abstract_zh: 数字微流控（DMF）是一种多功能平台，能够实现并行的液滴操作和现场可编程控制，其中液滴路径规划是实现自动化的关键挑战。为实现从源电极到目标电极的自动路径生成以及过程级反馈校正，本研究提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自适应智能控制框架。该框架整合了语言引导的拓扑地图重建、基于LLM的路径规划，以及双闭环反馈机制，实现了高精度的液滴操控。为缓解LLM在空间推理中常见的空间幻觉问题，如路径不连续和越界错误，本文设计了一种语言学拓扑地图重构方法，在复杂障碍环境下的路径生成准确率相比传统空间表示提升了23.4%。此外，提出了一种双闭环反馈策略，包括模型自我修正反馈与基于摄像头的图像反馈，能够实时纠正路径偏差，显著提升操作稳定性。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在多种液滴分布场景下均实现了100%的任务成功率，显著推动了微流控操作的智能化进程，并为完全自主的DMF系统奠定了坚实基础。

title: Maintaining Test Cases Under Requirement Evolution in Automotive Systems
authors: Surasak Phetmanee
publish: 2026 18th International Conference on Knowledge and Smart Technology (KST)
abstract: Software has long been an essential element in cars. Impact analysis is to determine factors and entities which are either directly or indirectly affected by changes. This paper focuses on impact analysis between the requirement based classification tree and test cases. Since requirements are usually described with informal language and transformed into the requirement based classification tree, testers also convert this requirement based classification tree into test scenarios. Furthermore, the classification tree is used for decision making in a self driving vehicle. In developing software for automotive systems, effects caused by changes to existing test cases not applicable elsewhere. The traditional solution to solve this problem was to generate all test cases to verify the changed system. Therefore, the traditional solution consumes time and resources. This paper presents an implementation of test cases impact analysis based on changes in an automotive system. This approach compares an automotive system version, diagnose changed entities, and generate new test cases. Results contain the solution of impact analysis for an automotive system. This technique addresses the traditional problem of test case regeneration in automotive software by selectively updating only test cases affected by requirement changes, thereby reducing unnecessary regeneration effort and testing overhead. Test cases are successfully updated and can be used to verify changes in the automotive software.
title_zh: 在汽车系统中需求演变下的测试用例维护
abstract_zh: 软件长期以来一直是汽车中的关键组成部分。影响分析旨在确定受变更直接影响或间接影响的因素和实体。本文聚焦于基于需求的分类树与测试用例之间的影响分析。由于需求通常以非正式语言描述，并被转换为基于需求的分类树，测试人员也将该分类树转化为测试场景。此外，分类树还用于自动驾驶车辆的决策制定。在开发汽车系统软件时，现有测试用例因变更而产生的影响无法在其他领域适用。传统的解决方案是生成所有测试用例以验证变更后的系统，因此传统方法会耗费大量时间和资源。本文提出了一种基于汽车系统变更的测试用例影响分析实现方案。该方法通过比较汽车系统版本，诊断出发生变更的实体，并生成新的测试用例。实验结果展示了针对汽车系统的完整影响分析解决方案。该技术通过仅选择性地更新受需求变更影响的测试用例，解决了传统汽车软件测试用例重新生成的问题，从而减少了不必要的再生工作量和测试开销。测试用例已成功更新，并可用于验证汽车软件的变更。

title: Hardware Software Co-Design of a CNN Accelerator for Real Time Image Classification
authors: Shardul Penurkar, Sangeeta Nakhate, Gaurav Tiwari
publish: 2026 IEEE International Students' Conference on Electrical, Electronics and Computer Science (SCEECS)
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have become the cornerstone of modern image recognition tasks, demonstrating remarkable accuracy in applications ranging from digit recognition to complex object detection. However, their computational requirements pose significant challenges for real-time deployment on resource-constrained embedded systems. This paper presents a comprehensive hardware-software co-design approach for accelerating CNN inference on the MNIST dataset, targeting the ZCU102 FPGA platform. The CNN model was initially trained in software using TensorFlow, achieving high accuracy on the test set, and its weights were subsequently exported and integrated into a hardware design implemented in Vitis HLS. The design employs custom hardware modules for convolution, activation, pooling, and fully connected layers, interfaced through BRAM with a Verilog testbench for validation. Simulation and synthesis results indicate substantial improvement in inference latency compared to software-only execution, while maintaining efficient utilization of FPGA resources. Detailed analysis of LUT, BRAM, and DSP utilization highlights the scalability and potential for extending the design to larger datasets and deeper CNN architectures, making it suitable for real-time embedded AI applications.
title_zh: 用于实时图像分类的CNN加速器的软硬件协同设计
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为现代图像识别任务的核心技术，在手写数字识别到复杂目标检测等应用中展现出卓越的准确性。然而，其高昂的计算需求给资源受限的嵌入式系统实现实时部署带来了显著挑战。本文提出了一种针对MNIST数据集的全面软硬件协同设计方法，旨在加速ZCU102 FPGA平台上的CNN推理。首先在软件环境中使用TensorFlow训练CNN模型，取得了优异的测试集准确率；随后将模型权重导出并集成至基于Vitis HLS实现的硬件设计中。该设计采用自定义硬件模块分别实现卷积、激活、池化和全连接层，并通过BRAM与Verilog测试平台进行接口连接以完成验证。仿真与综合结果表明，相较于纯软件执行，该方案在推理延迟方面实现了显著提升，同时保持了FPGA资源的高效利用。对LUT、BRAM及DSP资源利用率的详细分析进一步揭示了该设计在可扩展性方面的优势，具备向更大规模数据集和更深CNN架构拓展的潜力，因而适用于实时嵌入式人工智能应用。
